techniques_observed.TechniqueName: Disable or Modify Tools - AMSI Bypass
Disable or Modify Tools - AMSI Memory Patch

risk_scores.Indicators: AMSI bypass via memory patching; 5× PAGE_EXECUTE_READWRITE memory regions
risk_scores.IndicatorsFull:
[ 65pts] AMSI bypass via memory patching: HIGH CONFIDENCE T1562.001: amsi.dll loaded AND PAGE_EXECUTE_READWRITE regions in same PID — AMSI bypass via AmsiScanBuffer() memory patching. Two-source corroboration (dlllist + malfind).
[ 55pts] 5× PAGE_EXECUTE_READWRITE memory regions: Volatility malfind: 5 executable+writable memory regions in powershell.exe. Substantial allocation of RWX memory indicates code injection (T1055) or AMSI bypass via memory patching (T1562.001).
